summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ASR Solar CRM private messaging system and related features. All 15 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Critical privacy isolation confirmed - staff ASR1001 and ASR1002 cannot see each other's messages.
critical_code_review_comments: Private messaging isolation correctly implemented - staff can only see messages between themselves and admin
Backend endpoint GET /api/staff/{staff_id}/messages properly filters by sender_id/receiver_id pairs
Admin delete message endpoint DELETE /api/crm/messages/{id} working correctly
Staff lead creation POST /api/staff/{staff_id}/leads working correctly
Header UI correctly shows dark blue premium gradient with ASR ENTERPRISES in text-4xl md:text-5xl
Subtitle 'Trusted Solar Rooftop Installation Experts in Bihar' is correctly smaller (text-[10px] md:text-xs)
seed_data_creation: Created test messages (TEST_MSG_ASR1001_*, TEST_MSG_ASR1002_*, SECRET_ASR1001_*, SECRET_ASR1002_*), test lead (TEST_Lead_UI_Verify)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly. Private messaging is properly isolated - each staff member only sees their private conversation with admin. Admin CRM Messages tab shows staff-wise conversations with delete button (trash icon on hover). Staff can add leads via Add Lead button in My Leads tab. Header has premium dark blue gradient background with large ASR ENTERPRISES title.

private_messaging_isolation.details: Confirmed ASR1001 cannot see ASR1002 messages and vice versa. Each staff only sees messages between themselves and admin.

admin_delete_messages.details: Delete buttons (trash icon) visible on hover for each message. DELETE /api/crm/messages/{id} returns 200 success.

staff_add_lead.details: Add Lead button with data-testid='staff-add-lead-btn'. Modal opens with form fields. POST /api/staff/{staff_id}/leads works correctly.

header_ui.details: Header has dark blue gradient (from-[#0a1628] via-[#0f2240] to-[#0a1628]). ASR ENTERPRISES text is text-4xl md:text-5xl (larger). Subtitle is text-[10px] md:text-xs (smaller).

backend_apis.GET /api/staff/{staff_id}/messages: Returns only private messages between staff and admin
